feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2994
entry.content: >Bewitched Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84036062/ >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry.o

entry.title: /b/ Random: The only reason men are attracted to teenage girls is because of the forbidden fruit effect
entry.content: It's because they're off limits that you think you're attracted to them. Same reason women are attracted to married men. Teenage girls don't even know what they're doing and just lay there like starfish. I want a woman with experience who knows what she wants and what she's doing I don't want to have to show her the ropes. And what could you possibly have to talk about? Have you heard the things that come out of their mouths? That ought to be enough to turn you off right there.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Dear chuds
entry.content: It will make at least 1 billie and there's nothing you can do about it. Please spare me the screenshots of standard format theaters and only post IMAX screens for your counter arguments. It will be the defintive version of Homer's epic for decades to come. Lupita will be the first face people imagine when they hear "Helen of Troy". No other director is going to try to adapt it again for the big screen, and if they try it will always fall short to Nolan's version. It's going to win a few Oscars.

entry.content: I will NEVER forget this experiment I did near the end of the smaller 25 I created a foidfish account on bumble at fucking 9am on a tuesday (work day), which got +300 likes in less than 20 minutes - I got 250 likes in 3-4 days at my best try, brutal. I noticed that the top male profiles were as follows: >white/med >1.8m to 1.9 tall >fit >had money and success Now, where can you find such men in this latinx cunt? entry.title: /b/ Random: He Trusted the Science™
entry.content: So Lindsey Graham died (((Suddenly))) & (((Unexpectedly))) you say? There have been many such cases over the past 6 years. https://abcnews4.com/news/local/sen -lindsey-graham-receives-covid-19-v accine Furthermore, Graham received his annual (((Booster))) shot just a few days prior to his death. If you think his (((COVID))) shot years ago was too long ago to have killed him, keep in mind he also received a Vaxx recently. He was a science-trusting NPC sheep who always got all his shots as TPTB to

entry.title: /b/ Random: my mom has frequently mentioned "taking a leap of faith" when making a decision.…
entry.content: my mom has frequently mentioned "taking a leap of faith" when making a decision...i don't agree with this at all and i don't understand why someone would think like this. isn't it kind of retarded to take a leap of faith when making a major decision? it's like, you don't even know if what you decide to do is going to be beneficial for you (or someone else) or not, i think in that case you would need to be as informed as possible about the pro's and con's of the decision you're about to make, and

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Was he right for this?
entry.content: Thinking back i believe he has made the argument that ratings are a sliding scale. Something done by Kanye needs to be rated differently then something done by an independent artist. Because we expect kanye to do better, we expect expert mixing. It's like comparing an indie garage rock album to radio heads discography. But shouldn't art stand next to all its peers? By making leveled system we are inherently putting people down for being skillful and minimizing the accomplishments of the unknown.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Shelly 3 OS
entry.content: >be me >autist with too much free time and a nasm addiction >decide to make my own OS because "muh unix is bloated" >call it Shelly >write everything from scratch in pure x86_64 assembly >bootloader? hand rolled >kernel? hand rolled >shell? hand rolled >literally everything from sector 0 to the prompt >it boots >it has basic commands >you can ls, cat, echo, simple programs >feels fucking magical when the prompt appears >but no persistent storage >tried for weeks to get FAT32 or even a raw disk d

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Godzilla should be a metaphor - a metaphor for the USA
entry.content: First movie should be Imperial Japan at its height. Army, navy, airforce at full strength. They bomb an island and wake a literal sleeping giant (metaphor for pearl harbor). Godzilla island hops as it makes its way to Japan. Story follows Japan over confident, and later in full despair. Godzilla reaches Japan proper and unleashes his atomic breath. Japan is buck broken. Godzilla does it again, and the country gives up, ready to die. But Godzilla instead turns Japan into its home, only occasional

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8367 What a drag Edition Previous Thread: >>84024983 F-l…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8367 What a drag Edition Previous Thread: >>84024983 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profil

entry.title: /mu/ Music: M83 'Midnight City'
entry.content: There is something really special about this song. I don't know what it is. But there is something. This song is from a memory that you can't quite remember. This song is a feeling something you can't even explain. This song generates a feeling that doesn’t exist.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I allowed Windows 10 to update after many months, then booted up Jagged Alliance…
entry.content: I allowed Windows 10 to update after many months, then booted up Jagged Alliance 3 and minutes later my PSU exploded. The sparks were so bright, large and numerous that I genuinely think I saw an open flame starting to form for a split second. I'm sure it's a coincidence, but still. It's not a particularly intensive game (although not amazingly optimised) and I had played it before the same day, the only difference was the update. I don't know what I'm getting at, laugh at my misfortune if you m

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Any anons ever been to Rocklahoma? How was the experience? I'm a native Okie who…
entry.content: Any anons ever been to Rocklahoma? How was the experience? I'm a native Okie who's only been to one concert my whole life and it was August Burns Red which in retrospect sucked and I just wanted to fit in with my friends who like that screamo shit. This seems more to my taste.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Is that Spotted Driven?
entry.content: That diver has been on my mind. No cap, I been thinking about that time when I red carded him raw in a Kansas City stadium. That shit had to be the most ill-timed, comical, simulated dive I've ever reviewed on VAR. I swear to God, the most heavenly high is going over to the VAR screen while being fist-deep in my pocket searching for my cards. I had Spotem Divem screaming on the pitch with a second yellow too ridiculous to ignore. That diver simulated a foul and made me give Paredes a yellow, I h

But nobody fucking told me there's RNG and she has advanced cards so i lost like 10 matches AND THE FUCKING BITCH TOOK ALL MY CARDS EVEN MY UNIQUE IFRIT, now no way to get it back since i tried playing more and she never used it again! Npcs have a huge pool of cards and it's rare for them play the one you need and even rarer for you to win??? WHAT THE FUCK THAT MEANS IT TAKES HOURS OF PLAYING REPEATEDLY It's
